name: EXCEPTION ROW
purpose: One exception, one line: status bar + dot, bold claim, owner and due date right. Stacked into exception lists on one-pagers.

sample.claim: Docs on-time missed target by 14 points

rules: one exception per row; the claim carries a number
owner and due in caps, right-aligned: every exception is owned
status colors the bar and dot only, never the whole row
